  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics/acidwarp    Makefile pkg-descr 
    graphics/acidwarp/files patch-Makefile 
  Log:

  prefer PLIST_FILES and PORTDOCS to `dynamic plist'
  use BINMODE rather than using INSTALL directly
